Objects.Name: [Module] Collectable Counter
Objects.Notes: A controller that activates a switch if a certain number of specified items have been collected.

Classes.Name: CollectSwitchCtrl
Classes.Notes: A controller that activates a switch if a certain number of specified items have been collected.

Obj_arg0.Name: Item Type
Obj_arg0.Description: The item counter that will be checked. Default is 0.

Obj_arg1.Name: Item Count
Obj_arg1.Description: The number of items to compare.

Obj_arg2.Name: Comparator
Obj_arg2.Description: Specifies the method to compare between the player's item count and Obj_arg1. Default is 0.

Obj_arg3.Name: Activate Only Once?
Obj_arg3.Description: If set, the switch will only activate once and never deactivate.

Obj_arg4.Name: Clear Star Bits?
Obj_arg4.Description: If set, the player's Star Bit counter will be reset to 0 on death. This requires Obj_arg0 to be set to 2.
